data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for signature delegation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the signature delegation mechanism, specifically that if Party A is unavailable, Party A2 can sign. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this delegation functionality is implemented or validated within the system. The linked use case outlines the need for signature delegation but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of signature delegation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the signature delegation requirement.
